nasb.text: And it will come about in that day, that every place where there used to be a thousand vines, valued at a thousand shekels of silver, will become briars and thorns.

esv.text: In that day every place where there used to be a thousand vines, worth a thousand shekels of silver, will become briers and thorns.

cnv.text: 到那日，從前種一千棵葡萄樹，價值一萬一千四百克銀子的地方，現在卻成為荊棘和蒺藜生長之處。

ccb.text: 那时，本来有千株葡萄、价值千金的园子必长满荆棘和蒺藜，

csbs.text: “到那日， 所有种过一千棵葡萄树、 值一千银子的地方， 都必成为荆棘和蒺藜之地。
